languages.text: "Нунциус так считает, коллега. Не обращайте внимания, это лишь непроверенная гипотеза".
"Nuncius believes so, colleague. Pay it no mind, it is merely an unverified hypothesis."
languages.original_text: "Нунциус так считает, коллега. Не обращайте внимания, это лишь непроверенная гипотеза".

traits.locale_text: "That is Nuncius's believes so, colleague. Pay it no mind, it is merely an unverified hypothesis."
"That is Nuncius's believes so, colleague. Pay it no mind, it is merely an unverified hypothesis."
"Nuncius believes so, colleague. Pay it no mind, it is merely an unverified hypothesis."
"Nuncius believes so, colleague. Pay it no mind, it is merely an unverified hypothesis."

languages.text: «Nuncius cree que es así, colega. No le haga caso; es solo una hipótesis sin verificar».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius believes so, colleague. Pay it no mind, it is merely an unverified hypothesis."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius cree que es así, colega. No le haga caso; es solo una hipótesis sin verificar».

languages.text: “努恩修斯是这么认为的，同僚。不用太在意，这不过是未经证实的假说。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius believes so, colleague. Pay it no mind, it is merely an unverified hypothesis."

traits.locale_text: “努恩修斯是这么认为的，同僚。不用太在意，这不过是未经证实的假说。”

languages.text: "Nuncius geht davon aus, Kollege. Beachtet ihn gar nicht, das ist nur eine unverifizierte Hypothese."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius believes so, colleague. Pay it no mind, it is merely an unverified hypothesis."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius geht davon aus, Kollege. Beachtet ihn gar nicht, das ist nur eine unverifizierte Hypothese."

languages.text: « Pas moi, Nuncius, cher collègue, mais faites comme s'il n'avait rien dit, ce n'est guère qu'une hypothèse qui reste à vérifier. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius believes so, colleague. Pay it no mind, it is merely an unverified hypothesis."

traits.locale_text: « Pas moi, Nuncius, cher collègue, mais faites comme s'il n'avait rien dit, ce n'est guère qu'une hypothèse qui reste à vérifier. »

languages.text: "Nuncius öyle olduğuna inanıyor meslektaşım. Bu düşünceye aldırmayın, bu sadece doğrulanmamış bir hipotez."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius believes so, colleague. Pay it no mind, it is merely an unverified hypothesis."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius öyle olduğuna inanıyor meslektaşım. Bu düşünceye aldırmayın, bu sadece doğrulanmamış bir hipotez."

languages.text: 「ヌンシウスはそう信じているわ、同僚よ。気にしないで。ただの未確認の仮説なの。」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius believes so, colleague. Pay it no mind, it is merely an unverified hypothesis."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンシウスはそう信じているわ、同僚よ。気にしないで。ただの未確認の仮説なの。」
